Table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

Card of table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

Name

TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

Code

TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data:

DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_INTERACTION

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

SELECT

i.agent_id AS AGENT_IDENTIFIER,

i.appointment_id AS APPOINTMENT_IDENTIFIER,

i.brand_family AS BRAND_FAMILY_NAME,

i.campaign_id AS CAMPAIGN_IDENTIFIER,

i.case_id AS CASE_IDENTIFIER,

i.case_type AS CASE_TYPE,

i.category AS PRODUCT_CATEGORY,

i.channel_refcode AS CHANNEL_REFERENCE_CODE,

i.coach_id AS COACH_IDENTIFIER,

i.contract_id AS CONTRACT_IDENTIFIER,

i.correlation_id AS CORRELATION_IDENTIFIER,

i.country_ref_code AS COUNTRY_REFERENCE_CODE,

i.country_refcode AS COUNTRY_CODE,

i.currency AS CURRENCY_CODE,

TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(i.date_time) AS INTERACTION_DATETIME,

i.document_type AS DOCUMENT_TYPE,

i.dte_retailer_id AS DTE_RETAILER_IDENTIFIER,

i.event_id AS EVENT_IDENTIFIER,

i.external_reference AS EXTERNAL_REFERENCE,

i.final_result AS FINAL_RESULT,

i.friend_id AS FRIEND_IDENTIFIER,

i.identity_unique_identifier AS IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK,

i.interaction_id AS INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK,

i.interaction_type_refcode AS INTERACTION_TYPE_REFERENCE_CODE,

i.iFrame_Configuration_ID AS IFRAME_CONFIGURATION_IDENTIFIER,

i.ip_address AS IP_ADDRESS,

i.location_address AS LOCATION_ADDRESS,

i.location_address_city AS LOCATION_ADDRESS_CITY,

i.location_address_country_refcode AS LOCATION_ADDRESS_COUNTRY_REFERENCE_CODE,

i.location_address_line_1 AS LOCATION_ADDRESS_FIRST_LINE,

i.location_address_zip_code AS LOCATION_ADDRESS_ZIP_CODE,

i.location_description AS LOCATION_DESCRIPTION,

i.location_id AS LOCATION_IDENTIFIER,

i.location_name AS LOCATION_NAME,

i.location_type_refcode AS LOCATION_TYPE_REFERENCE_CODE,

i.market_ref_code AS MARKET_REFERENCE_CODE,

i.market_refcode AS MARKET_CODE,

i.order_amount AS ORDER_AMOUNT,

i.order_id AS ORDER_IDENTIFIER,

i.payment_method AS PAYMENT_METHOD,

i.platform_brand AS PLATFORM_BRAND,

i.preferred_platform AS PREFERRED_PLATFORM,

i.product_code AS PRODUCT_CODE,

i.reason AS INTERACTION_REASON,

i.reason_description AS INTERACTION_REASON_DESCRIPTION,

i.reason_id AS INTERACTION_REASON_IDENTIFIER,

i.reason_refcode AS INTERACTION_REASON_REFERENCE_CODE,

i.retailer_id AS RETAILER_IDENTIFIER,

i.retailer_name AS RETAILER_NAME,

i.sap_id AS INTERACTION_SAP_IDENTIFIER,

i.session_id AS INTERACTION_SESSION_IDENTIFIER,

i.state_id AS AGE_VERIFICATION_STATUS,

i.tech_partition_month AS TECH_PARTITION_MONTH,

i.tech_partition_year AS TECH_PARTITION_YEAR,

i.vendor AS VENDOR_NAME,

i.app_id AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_IDENTIFIER,

i.subscription_id AS PARENT_ORDER_CODE,

CASE

WHEN INTERACTION_DATETIME IS NOT NULL

AND (i.dup_cnt = 1 OR i.rn_by_load_ts = 1)

THEN INTERACTION_DATETIME

ELSE i.__load_ts

END AS VALID_FROM,

i.__load_ts

-- [VALID_TO]

-- [ACTIVE_FLAG]

FROM (

SELECT

i.*,

COUNT(*) OVER (

PARTITION BY i.identity_unique_identifier, i.interaction_id, i.DATE_TIME

) AS dup_cnt,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY i.identity_unique_identifier, i.interaction_id, i.DATE_TIME

ORDER BY i.__load_ts ASC

) AS rn_by_load_ts

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_INTERACTION i WHERE TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(i.date_time) <= i.__LOAD_TS OR TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(i.date_time) IS NULL

) i;

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: identity_unique_identifier, interaction_id

Primary key(s) Target: IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK, INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

PII data

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level.

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

RLS v2 incorporates a join to MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER within the sharing script.

 

SELECT i.*

FROM TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION i

JOIN MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER c

ON c.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK = i.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK

AND i.VALID_FROM >= c.VALID_FROM

AND i.VALID_FROM < c.VALID_TO

WHERE

c.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR i.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES);

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_INTERACTION


Check constraint name of the table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

CKT_TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION


Server validation rule of the table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

%RULES%


Code preview of the table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION

drop table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION
--==============================================================
create or replace table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION (
IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE TEXT,
AGENT_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
APPOINTMENT_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
BRAND_FAMILY_NAME TEXT,
CAMPAIGN_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
CASE_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
CASE_TYPE TEXT,
PRODUCT_CATEGORY TEXT,
CHANNEL_REFERENCE_CODE TEXT,
COACH_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
CONTRACT_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
CORRELATION_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
CURRENCY_CODE TEXT,
DOCUMENT_TYPE TEXT,
DTE_RETAILER_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
EVENT_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
EXTERNAL_REFERENCE TEXT,
FINAL_RESULT TEXT,
FRIEND_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
INTERACTION_TYPE_REFERENCE_CODE TEXT,
IFRAME_CONFIGURATION_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
IP_ADDRESS TEXT,
LOCATION_ADDRESS TEXT,
LOCATION_ADDRESS_CITY TEXT,
LOCATION_ADDRESS_COUNTRY_REFERENCE_CODE TEXT,
LOCATION_ADDRESS_FIRST_LINE TEXT,
LOCATION_ADDRESS_ZIP_CODE TEXT,
LOCATION_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
LOCATION_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
LOCATION_NAME TEXT,
LOCATION_TYPE_REFERENCE_CODE TEXT,
MARKET_CODE TEXT,
ORDER_AMOUNT DECIMAL(38,5),
ORDER_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
PAYMENT_METHOD TEXT,
PLATFORM_BRAND TEXT,
PREFERRED_PLATFORM TEXT,
PRODUCT_CODE TEXT,
INTERACTION_REASON TEXT,
INTERACTION_REASON_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
INTERACTION_REASON_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
INTERACTION_REASON_REFERENCE_CODE TEXT,
RETAILER_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
RETAILER_NAME TEXT,
INTERACTION_SAP_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
INTERACTION_SESSION_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
AGE_VERIFICATION_STATUS TEXT,
VENDOR_NAME TEXT,
PARENT_ORDER_CODE__ TEXT,
SOURCE_SYSTEM_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
INTERACTION_DATETIME DATE,
VALID_FROM DATE not null,
VALID_TO DATE not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG BOOLEAN not null,
constraint PK_TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION primary key (IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK, INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION set comment = 'The Interactions table provides a consolidated overview of consumer engagements across all channels in the DCE2.0 ecosystem. It captures the nature and context of each interaction, including the interaction type, the channel used, and when relevant, details about retailers, CSC agents, or coaches. This dataset enables a unified understanding of consumer touchpoints and supports consistent analysis of consumer experience and operational performance.';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Unique original identifier of the user (identity_unique_identifier)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Unique ID of the interaction. Reference data: Action_ID (interaction_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.COUNTRY_CODE is
'2 letters ISO country code (country_refcode)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.AGENT_IDENTIFIER is
'Identifier of the CSC agent present in the interaction (agent_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.APPOINTMENT_IDENTIFIER is
'Identifier of the appointment (appointment_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.BRAND_FAMILY_NAME is
'Brand family name of the product that is used in the interaction (brand_family)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.CAMPAIGN_IDENTIFIER is
'Identifier of the campaign (campaign_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.CASE_IDENTIFIER is
'Identifier of the interaction (case_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.CASE_TYPE is
'Type of the B2C Case. Reference data: Case Type. (case_type)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.PRODUCT_CATEGORY is
'Picked up from the product_catalog, values: ht-device/ ht-accessories/ ht-consumables / pv-device/ pv-accessories/ pv-consumables (category)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.CHANNEL_REFERENCE_CODE is
'Specifies the channel in which the interaction occurred. Reference Data: Interaction Channel (channel_refcode)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.COACH_IDENTIFIER is
'Identifier of the IQOS Coach present in the interaction (coach_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.CONTRACT_IDENTIFIER is
'Identifier of the Heets contract signed by consumers (contract_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.CORRELATION_IDENTIFIER is
'Required to correlate DCE 2 data point with legacy system transaction (correlation_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.CURRENCY_CODE is
'Code of the currency that is used during a purchase interaction (currency)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.DOCUMENT_TYPE is
'Type of document used for the age verification (document_type)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.DTE_RETAILER_IDENTIFIER is
'Unique identifier of the retailer in DTE system (dte_retailer_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.EVENT_IDENTIFIER is
'Identifier of the event related to the interaction (event_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.EXTERNAL_REFERENCE is
'External identifier for interactions happening in indirect retail (external_reference)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.FINAL_RESULT is
'Indicates eligibility outcome of device diagnostic; populated for QURE interaction only, has Y/N value (eligible/not eligible) (final_result)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.FRIEND_IDENTIFIER is
'Unique identifier of the person (friend) that referred in case it happened (friend_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.INTERACTION_TYPE_REFERENCE_CODE is
'Type of interaction. Reference data: Interaction type (interaction_type_refcode)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.IFRAME_CONFIGURATION_IDENTIFIER is
'ID of iFrame configuration (iFrame_Configuration_ID)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.IP_ADDRESS is
'Identifier of the customer IP (ip_address)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.LOCATION_ADDRESS is
'Full adress (or part of it) of the location where the interaction occured (address of the retailer store) (location_address)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.LOCATION_ADDRESS_CITY is
'City of the address (address of the retailer store) (location_address_city)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.LOCATION_ADDRESS_COUNTRY_REFERENCE_CODE is
'2 letters ISO country code of the country from the location address (location_address_country_refcode)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.LOCATION_ADDRESS_FIRST_LINE is
'line_1 of the location address, can be street name, number and optional appartement number (address of the retailer store) (location_address_line_1)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.LOCATION_ADDRESS_ZIP_CODE is
'Zip code of the location where the interaction took place (address of the retailer store) (location_address_zip_code)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.LOCATION_DESCRIPTION is
'Short description of the location where interaction takes place (location_description)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.LOCATION_IDENTIFIER is
'Identifier of the location in which the interaction took place (location_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.LOCATION_NAME is
'Name of the location where the interaction occurred (location_name)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.LOCATION_TYPE_REFERENCE_CODE is
'Type (shop, hotel, etc. ) of the location where interaction takes place (location_type_refcode)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.MARKET_CODE is
'Code of the Market (market_refcode)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.ORDER_AMOUNT is
'Amount of the order if applicable (order_amount)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.ORDER_IDENTIFIER is
'Identifier of the sales order (order_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.PAYMENT_METHOD is
'Payment method of the order if applicable. Reference Data: Payment Scheme/ Brand (payment_method)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.PLATFORM_BRAND is
'The type of the SFP platform that product belongs to if interactions includes a product (platform_brand)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.PREFERRED_PLATFORM is
'Preferred platform for the consumer. Reference data: Platform Brand (preferred_platform)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.PRODUCT_CODE is
'Product code (product_code)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.INTERACTION_REASON is
'Reason for the interaction. Reference data: Reason (reason)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.INTERACTION_REASON_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the reason of the interaction (reason_description)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.INTERACTION_REASON_IDENTIFIER is
'Identifier of the reason for the interaction (reason_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.INTERACTION_REASON_REFERENCE_CODE is
'Reason of the interaction. Reference code: Interaction Reason (reason_refcode)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.RETAILER_IDENTIFIER is
'To link the RAAS retailer carrying out the Registration (Identity) to the related Interaction record.
SOURCE: FSL - Keys for Store Master - DCE 2.0 Home - PMI DCE Confluence (retailer_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.RETAILER_NAME is
'Name of the retailer where the interaction occurred (retailer_name)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.INTERACTION_SAP_IDENTIFIER is
'External identifier of the interaction in SAP system.
For Self Service Registrations ie IQoS Plus - the SAPID is used to identify the store - what the customer enters to identify the store (alternate ID), they will enter the SAP_ID as this is a more user-friendly id. (sap_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.INTERACTION_SESSION_IDENTIFIER is
'The unique identifier of the interaction session (session_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.AGE_VERIFICATION_STATUS is
'Status if it is an age verification interaction
true/false boolean value (state_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.VENDOR_NAME is
'Name of the vendor that triggers the interaction (vendor)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.PARENT_ORDER_CODE__ is
'It''s the ID through which the subscription has been identified by AD service (subscription_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.SOURCE_SYSTEM_IDENTIFIER is
'Shows which system/source has triggered the interaction. (app_id)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.INTERACTION_DATETIME is
'Timestamp of the interaction date (date_time)';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is Active ';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active ';

comment on column TDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the record is active ';
